# ReactKlineChart - LLM Documentation

This file provides comprehensive documentation for ReactKlineChart, a React component library for K-line/candlestick charts built on klinecharts v10.

## Overview

ReactKlineChart is a pure display component that wraps klinecharts with a declarative API. It provides:
- Composable components for indicator configuration
- Built-in technical indicators (VOL, MACD, KDJ, RSI, CCI)
- Theme system with presets and customization
- Buy/sell signal markers
- Preset components for quick setup

## Installation

```bash
npm install @jswork/react-klinecharts klinecharts@10.0.0-beta3
# or
yarn add @jswork/react-klinecharts klinecharts@10.0.0-beta3
```

## Quick Start

### Basic Usage - Preset Components

```tsx
import { SimpleChart } from '@jswork/react-klinecharts';
import type { KLineData, Signal } from '@jswork/react-klinecharts';

const data: KLineData[] = [
  { timestamp: 1625097600000, open: 100, high: 105, low: 98, close: 103, volume: 1000000 },
];

const signals: Signal[] = [
  { type: 'buy', timestamp: 1625097600000, price: 100 },
];

function App() {
  return <SimpleChart data={data} signals={signals} theme="dark" />;
}
```

### Custom Composition

```tsx
import { ReactKlineChart, Indicator } from '@jswork/react-klinecharts';

function App() {
  return (
    <ReactKlineChart
      data={data}
      signals={signals}
      theme="dark"
      maParams={{ periods: [5, 10, 20], colors: ['#fff', '#ff6600', '#00ff00'] }}
    >
      <Indicator type="VOL" />
      <Indicator type="MACD" params={{ fast: 12, slow: 26, signal: 9 }} />
      <Indicator type="KDJ" params={{ n: 9, m1: 3, m2: 3 }} />
    </ReactKlineChart>
  );
}
```

## Components

### ReactKlineChart

Main component providing composable API through children `<Indicator>` components.

**Props:**
- `data: KLineData[]` - K-line data (required)
- `signals?: Signal[]` - Buy/sell signal markers
- `theme?: ThemeProp` - Theme configuration (preset name or custom)
- `maParams?: MAParams` - MA moving average configuration
- `height?: number | string` - Chart height (default: 600)
- `className?: string` - Custom className
- `style?: React.CSSProperties` - Custom styles
- `children?: React.ReactNode` - Indicator components

**Example:**
```tsx
<ReactKlineChart
  data={klineData}
  signals={signals}
  theme={{
    preset: 'dark',
    colors: { upColor: '#custom', downColor: '#custom' }
  }}
  maParams={{ periods: [5, 20, 60], colors: ['#fff', '#ff6600', '#00ff00'] }}
  height={800}
>
  <Indicator type="VOL" />
  <Indicator type="MACD" />
</ReactKlineChart>
```

### Indicator

Declarative component for configuring sub-chart indicators. Returns `null` (no rendering).

**Props:**
- `type: string` - Indicator type name (built-in or custom registered)
- `params?: IndicatorParams` - Indicator parameters (optional)
- `visible?: boolean` - Show/hide indicator (default: true)

**Important:** Indicator children order determines sub-chart display order. First child = top sub-chart.

**Example:**
```tsx
<Indicator type="VOL" />
<Indicator type="MACD" params={{ fast: 12, slow: 26, signal: 9 }} />
<Indicator type="KDJ" visible={false} />
```

### MainChart

Preset component: Main chart only (candlestick + MA lines), no sub-chart indicators.

**Props:**
- `data: KLineData[]` - K-line data (required)
- `signals?: Signal[]` - Buy/sell signal markers
- `theme?: ThemeProp` - Theme configuration
- `maParams?: MAParams` - MA parameters (default: { periods: [5, 20] })
- `height?: number | string` - Chart height (default: 400)
- `className?: string` - Custom className

**Example:**
```tsx
<MainChart data={data} theme="light" height={400} />
```

### SimpleChart

Preset component: Main chart + VOL (volume) + MACD indicators.

**Props:**
- Same as MainChart (default height: 600)

**Example:**
```tsx
<SimpleChart data={data} signals={signals} theme="dark" />
```

## Theme System

### Preset Themes

Four built-in themes:
- `dark` - Dark background (#1f2937), red up/green down, no grid
- `light` - White background (#ffffff), red up/green down, grid shown
- `red-green` - Dark background, red up (#ef4444)/green down (#22c55e)
- `green-red` - Dark background, green up (#22c55e)/red down (#ef4444) - inverted colors

### Custom Theme

Two ways to customize:

**1. Theme name (preset):**
```tsx
<ReactKlineChart theme="dark" />
```

**2. Preset + custom colors:**
```tsx
<ReactKlineChart theme={{
  preset: 'dark',
  colors: {
    upColor: '#ff0000',
    downColor: '#00ff00',
    backgroundColor: '#000',
  }
}} />
```

### ThemeConfig Interface

```typescript
interface ThemeConfig {
  upColor: string;        // Price up color
  downColor: string;      // Price down color
  noChangeColor: string;  // No change color
  backgroundColor: string; // Background color
  grid?: {
    show: boolean;
    color?: string;
  };
  textColor?: string;
}
```

## Built-in Indicators

### VOL (Volume)

Volume indicator, no configurable parameters.

```tsx
<Indicator type="VOL" />
```

### MACD

MACD indicator with configurable fast/slow/signal periods.

**Default params:** `{ fast: 12, slow: 26, signal: 9 }`

**Configurable params:**
- `fast: number` (1-100) - Fast EMA period
- `slow: number` (1-100) - Slow EMA period
- `signal: number` (1-100) - Signal line period

```tsx
<Indicator type="MACD" params={{ fast: 12, slow: 26, signal: 9 }} />
```

### KDJ

KDJ stochastic indicator.

**Default params:** `{ n: 9, m1: 3, m2: 3 }`

**Configurable params:**
- `n: number` (1-100) - N period
- `m1: number` (1-100) - M1 period
- `m2: number` (1-100) - M2 period

```tsx
<Indicator type="KDJ" params={{ n: 9, m1: 3, m2: 3 }} />
```

### RSI

Relative Strength Index.

**Default params:** `{ period: 14 }`

**Configurable params:**
- `period: number` (1-100) - RSI period

```tsx
<Indicator type="RSI" params={{ period: 14 }} />
```

### CCI

Commodity Channel Index.

**Default params:** `{ period: 14 }`

**Configurable params:**
- `period: number` (1-100) - CCI period

```tsx
<Indicator type="CCI" params={{ period: 14 }} />
```

## Custom Indicators

Register custom indicators using `registerIndicator`:

```tsx
import { registerIndicator } from '@jswork/react-klinecharts';

registerIndicator({
  name: 'BOLL',             // Unique identifier
  displayName: '布林带',    // Display name
  defaultParams: { period: 20, stdDev: 2 },
  paramsSchema: [
    { key: 'period', label: '周期', type: 'number', defaultValue: 20, min: 1, max: 100 },
    { key: 'stdDev', label: '标准差', type: 'number', defaultValue: 2, min: 1, max: 10 },
  ],
  create: (params) => ({
    name: 'BOLL',
    calcParams: [params.period as number, params.stdDev as number],
  }),
});

// Use registered indicator
<Indicator type="BOLL" params={{ period: 20 }} />
```

## Type Definitions

### KLineData

```typescript
interface KLineData {
  timestamp: number;  // Unix timestamp in milliseconds
  open: number;       // Opening price
  close: number;      // Closing price
  high: number;       // Highest price
  low: number;        // Lowest price
  volume: number;     // Volume
  turnover?: number;  // Turnover (optional)
}
```

### Signal

```typescript
interface Signal {
  type: 'buy' | 'sell';  // Signal type
  timestamp: number;     // Unix timestamp in milliseconds
  price: number;         // Signal price
  text?: string;         // Custom text (default: "买"/"卖")
}
```

### MAParams

```typescript
interface MAParams {
  periods: number[];  // MA periods array, e.g., [5, 20, 60]
  colors?: string[];  // MA line colors (optional)
}
```

## API Reference

### Exports

```typescript
// Components
export { ReactKlineChart } from './components/react-kline-chart';
export { Indicator } from './components/indicator';
export { MainChart } from './components/presets/main-chart';
export { SimpleChart } from './components/presets/simple-chart';

// Registration
export { registerIndicator, indicatorRegistry } from './core/indicator-registry';

// Types
export type {
  KLineData,
  Signal,
  IndicatorParams,
  IndicatorConfig,
  IndicatorDefinition,
  IndicatorParamSchema,
  MAParams,
  ThemeConfig,
  PresetTheme,
  ThemeProp,
  ReactKlineChartProps,
  IndicatorProps,
} from './types';
```

## Common Patterns

### Dynamic Indicator Visibility

```tsx
const [showMACD, setShowMACD] = useState(true);

<ReactKlineChart data={data}>
  <Indicator type="VOL" />
  <Indicator type="MACD" visible={showMACD} />
</ReactKlineChart>
```

### Custom MA Configuration

```tsx
<ReactKlineChart
  data={data}
  maParams={{
    periods: [5, 10, 20, 60],
    colors: ['#ffffff', '#ff6600', '#00ff00', '#ff00ff']
  }}
/>
```

### Buy/Sell Signals

```tsx
const signals = [
  { type: 'buy', timestamp: 1625097600000, price: 100, text: '买入点' },
  { type: 'sell', timestamp: 1625184000000, price: 107, text: '卖出点' },
];

<SimpleChart data={data} signals={signals} />
```

### Multiple Charts

```tsx
function App() {
  return (
    <>
      <MainChart data={stockData} height={300} />
      <SimpleChart data={indexData} signals={signals} height={400} />
    </>
  );
}
```

## Important Notes

1. **klinecharts dependency:** Requires klinecharts v10.0.0-beta3 as peer dependency
2. **Indicator order matters:** Children order in `<ReactKlineChart>` determines sub-chart display order
3. **Pure display component:** All data must be passed via props, no internal data fetching
4. **Chart cleanup:** Component automatically calls `dispose()` on unmount
5. **Theme defaults:** Uses `dark` theme by default if not specified
6. **TypeScript support:** Full type definitions included in package

## Architecture

ReactKlineChart follows these design principles:

- **Composable API:** Declarative configuration through React children
- **Registry Pattern:** Centralized indicator management with extensibility
- **Theme Layer:** Preset themes with customization overlay
- **Manager Pattern:** ChartManager encapsulates klinecharts lifecycle
- **Pure Components:** No side effects, all configuration via props

## File Structure

```
packages/lib/src/
├── types/index.ts              - TypeScript definitions
├── core/
│   ├── indicator-registry.ts   - Indicator registration center
│   ├── theme-manager.ts        - Theme resolution logic
│   └── chart-manager.ts        - klinecharts wrapper
├── indicators/
│   ├── vol.ts, macd.ts, kdj.ts, rsi.ts, cci.ts
│   └── index.ts                - Auto-registration
├── components/
│   ├── react-kline-chart.tsx   - Main component
│   ├── indicator.tsx           - Declarative config component
│   └ presets/
│   ├── main-chart.tsx          - Main chart preset
│   └── simple-chart.tsx        - Main+VOL+MACD preset
└── index.tsx                   - Public API exports
```

## Examples

See `packages/example/src/app.tsx` for working examples using real stock data (上证指数) from 东方财富 API.

## Links

- GitHub: https://github.com/afeiship/react-klinecharts
- klinecharts: https://klinecharts.com
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@jswork/react-klinecharts

---

For questions or issues, please open a GitHub issue or check the example app for implementation patterns.
